params.name: ipAddress
params.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to check.

params.name: maxAgeInDays
params.description: Restrict reports considered to those within the last N days (1-365, default 30).

params.name: verbose
params.description: When present, include the most recent reports in the response.

items.docs:
Returns the current abuse data for a single IPv4 or IPv6 address,
including the abuse confidence score, country, ISP, usage type, and
(when `verbose` is set) the most recent reports.

params.name: maxAgeInDays
params.description: Restrict to reports within the last N days (1-365, default 30).

items.docs:
Returns the abuse data for a CIDR network range. Free accounts may query
ranges up to /24; subscriber tiers can query up to /16.

info.name: List Reports for an IP Address

params.name: ipAddress
params.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address whose reports should be returned.

params.name: maxAgeInDays
params.description: Restrict to reports within the last N days (1-365, default 30).

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of recent reports for a given IP address.

Submit a new abuse report for an IP address with one or more category
IDs, an optional comment, and an optional ISO 8601 timestamp.
Submit many abuse reports at once via a CSV multipart upload.

params.name: confidenceMinimum
params.description: Minimum confidence score (25-100, default 100; subscriber feature below 100).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries to return (varies by plan, up to 500,000).

params.name: onlyCountries
params.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to include (subscriber feature).

params.name: exceptCountries
params.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to exclude (subscriber feature).

params.name: ipVersion
params.description: Restrict to a specific IP version (4 or 6).

params.name: plaintext
params.description: When present, return one IP per line as text/plain instead of JSON.

items.docs:
Returns the AbuseIPDB blacklist. Free accounts receive up to 10,000
entries; subscriber tiers can customise the confidence floor, country
filters, IP version, and maximum result count.

info.name: Clear Your Reports for an IP Address

params.name: ipAddress
params.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address whose reports (filed by your account) should be cleared.

items.docs: Remove all of your own past reports for the given IP address.
